item.title: 7 Million Cancers A Year Are Preventable, Says New Report
item.description: Tobacco smoking, alcohol consumption and infections were the three leading causes of preventable cancers according to research by the World Health Org...

item.title: Apple iOS 26.3 — Critical Update Now Live For All iPhone Users
item.description: The next iPhone update is here with new features for all users and key changes for those in the EU.

item.title: iOS 26.3—Update Now Warning Issued To All iPhone Users
item.description: Apple has released iOS 26.3 fixing 39 security flaws — one of which is already being used in real-life attacks. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Why Skyscrapers And Tall Buildings Are Now Being Upcycled
